question: The chart shows the percentage of people who value different Valentine's gifts. Based on the percentages shown next to the points, which statement is supported by the data?

options.A: Flowers have the highest value among all the categories.
options.B: Cards and Candy have nearly the same value.
options.C: Dining Out is valued more than Flowers.
options.D: Jewelry has the lowest value among all the categories.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
